items.title: Roper Technologies (Nasdaq: ROP) boosts 2026 guidance after Q2 gains - Stock Titan
items.summary: Roper Technologies (Nasdaq: ROP) boosts 2026 guidance after Q2 gains    Stock Titan

items.title: Roper Technologies announces second quarter financial results
items.summary: Roper Technologies reported Q2 2026 revenue of $2.11 billion with 9% total growth (5% organic) and adjusted DEPS of $5.38, up 10%. The company repurchased 9.0 million shares for $3.2 billion year-to-date and raised full year 2026 guidance for adjusted DEPS to $22.15-$22.30 and organic revenue growth to ~6%. Management highlighted AI product launches and strong free cash flow growth of 11%.
